build.beforeDevCommand: unset npm_config_prefix && export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use default --silent && cd ../web && npm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: unset npm_config_prefix && export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use default --silent && cd ../web && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:*; img-src 'self' data: blob:;
